title: [kimi-review] 7f46d18: [SEVERITY: high] **Missing `join()` before freeing resources
description:
Commit: 7f46d1898
Message: fix(kiss): stop RX thread in deinit with shutdown flag

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] **Missing `join()` before freeing resources** — If deinit sets the flag but doesn't join (or joins without ensuring wakeup), the RX thread may still run and access freed state (use-after-free).
